{{Coord|24.164536|121.604555|display=title}} [[File:Changching_Shrine.jpg|thumb|A closer view of the Evergreen Shrine]]
The '''Evergreen Ancestral Hall''' is a memorial in Taiwan. It is located in [[Kaohsiung|Kaohsiung City]], [[Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|Taoyuan District]], Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the [[Southern Cross-Island Highway]] ([[Southern Cross-Island Highway|Taiwan Route 20]] 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.
Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.
== See also ==

It is located in [[Kaohsiung|Kaohsiung City]], [[Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|Taoyuan District]], Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the [[Southern Cross-Island Highway]] ([[Southern Cross-Island Highway|Taiwan Route 20]] 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.
Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

{{Coord|24.164536|121.604555|display=title}} [[File:Changching_Shrine.jpg|thumb|A closer view of the Evergreen Shrine]]
The '''Evergreen Ancestral Hall''' is a memorial in Taiwan. It is located in [[Kaohsiung|Kaohsiung City]], [[Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|Taoyuan District]], Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the [[Southern Cross-Island Highway]] ([[Southern Cross-Island Highway|Taiwan Route 20]] 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.
Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

{{Coord|24.164536|121.604555|display=title}} [[File:Changching_Shrine.jpg|thumb|A closer view of the Evergreen Shrine]]
The '''Evergreen Ancestral Hall''' is a memorial in Taiwan. It is located in [[Kaohsiung|Kaohsiung City]], [[Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|Taoyuan District]], Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the [[Southern Cross-Island Highway]] ([[Southern Cross-Island Highway|Taiwan Route 20]] 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.
Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

{{Coord|24.164536|121.604555|display=title}} [[File:Changching_Shrine.jpg|thumb|A closer view of the Evergreen Shrine]]
The '''Evergreen Ancestral Hall''' is a memorial in Taiwan. It is located in [[Kaohsiung|Kaohsiung City]], [[Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|Taoyuan District]], Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the [[Southern Cross-Island Highway]] ([[Southern Cross-Island Highway|Taiwan Route 20]] 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.
Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

{{Coord|24.164536|121.604555|display=title}} [[File:Changching_Shrine.jpg|thumb|A closer view of the Evergreen Shrine]]
The '''Evergreen Ancestral Hall''' is a memorial in Taiwan. It is located in [[Kaohsiung|Kaohsiung City]], [[Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|Taoyuan District]], Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the [[Southern Cross-Island Highway]] ([[Southern Cross-Island Highway|Taiwan Route 20]] 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.
Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

{{Coord|24.164536|121.604555|display=title}} [[File:Changching_Shrine.jpg|thumb|A closer view of the Evergreen Shrine]]
The '''Evergreen Ancestral Hall''' is a memorial in Taiwan. It is located in [[Kaohsiung|Kaohsiung City]], [[Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|Taoyuan District]], Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the [[Southern Cross-Island Highway]] ([[Southern Cross-Island Highway|Taiwan Route 20]] 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.
Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

{{Coord|24.164536|121.604555|display=title}} [[File:Changching_Shrine.jpg|thumb|A closer view of the Evergreen Shrine]]
The '''Evergreen Ancestral Hall''' is a memorial in Taiwan. It is located in [[Kaohsiung|Kaohsiung City]], [[Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|Taoyuan District]], Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the [[Southern Cross-Island Highway]] ([[Southern Cross-Island Highway|Taiwan Route 20]] 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.
Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

{{Coord|24.164536|121.604555|display=title}} [[File:Changching_Shrine.jpg|thumb|A closer view of the Evergreen Shrine]]
The '''Evergreen Ancestral Hall''' is a memorial in Taiwan. It is located in [[Kaohsiung|Kaohsiung City]], [[Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|Taoyuan District]], Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the [[Southern Cross-Island Highway]] ([[Southern Cross-Island Highway|Taiwan Route 20]] 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.
Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

{{Coord|24.164536|121.604555|display=title}} [[File:Changching_Shrine.jpg|thumb|A closer view of the Evergreen Shrine]]
The '''Evergreen Ancestral Hall''' is a memorial in Taiwan. It is located in [[Kaohsiung|Kaohsiung City]], [[Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|Taoyuan District]], Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the [[Southern Cross-Island Highway]] ([[Southern Cross-Island Highway|Taiwan Route 20]] 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.
Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

{{Coord|24.164536|121.604555|display=title}} [[File:Changching_Shrine.jpg|thumb|A closer view of the Evergreen Shrine]]
The '''Evergreen Ancestral Hall''' is a memorial in Taiwan. It is located in [[Kaohsiung|Kaohsiung City]], [[Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|Taoyuan District]], Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the [[Southern Cross-Island Highway]] ([[Southern Cross-Island Highway|Taiwan Route 20]] 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.
Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

{{Coord|24.164536|121.604555|display=title}} [[File:Changching_Shrine.jpg|thumb|A closer view of the Evergreen Shrine]]
The '''Evergreen Ancestral Hall''' is a memorial in Taiwan. It is located in [[Kaohsiung|Kaohsiung City]], [[Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|Taoyuan District]], Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the [[Southern Cross-Island Highway]] ([[Southern Cross-Island Highway|Taiwan Route 20]] 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.
Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

{{Coord|24.164536|121.604555|display=title}}
[[File:Changching_Shrine.jpg|thumb|A closer view of the Evergreen Shrine]]

The '''Evergreen Ancestral Hall''' is a memorial in Taiwan. It is located in [[:en:Kaohsiung|Kaohsiung City]], [[:en:Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|Taoyuan District]], Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the [[:en:Southern Cross-Island Highway|Southern Cross-Island Highway]] ([[:en:Southern Cross-Island Highway|Taiwan Route 20]] 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.

Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

== See also ==

* [[:en:Yushan National Park|Yushan National Park]]
* [[:en:Eternal Spring Shrine|Eternal Spring Shrine]]

}}

{{Coord|24.164536|121.604555|display=title}}
[[File:Changching_Shrine.jpg|thumb|A closer view of the Evergreen Shrine]]

The '''Evergreen Ancestral Hall''' is a memorial in Taiwan. It is located in [[:en:Kaohsiung|Kaohsiung City]], [[:en:Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|Taoyuan District]], Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the [[:en:Southern Cross-Island Highway|Southern Cross-Island Highway]] ([[:en:Southern Cross-Island Highway|Taiwan Route 20]] 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.

Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

== See also ==

* [[:en:Yushan National Park|Yushan National Park]]
* [[:en:Eternal Spring Shrine|Eternal Spring Shrine]]

}}

{{Coord|24.164536|121.604555|display=title}}
[[File:Changching_Shrine.jpg|thumb|A closer view of the Evergreen Shrine]]

The '''Evergreen Ancestral Hall''' is a memorial in Taiwan. It is located in [[:en:Kaohsiung|Kaohsiung City]], [[:en:Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|Taoyuan District]], Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the [[:en:Southern Cross-Island Highway|Southern Cross-Island Highway]] ([[:en:Southern Cross-Island Highway|Taiwan Route 20]] 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.

Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

== See also ==

* [[:en:Yushan National Park|Yushan National Park]]
* [[:en:Eternal Spring Shrine|Eternal Spring Shrine]]

It is located in [[:en:Kaohsiung|Kaohsiung City]], [[:en:Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|Taoyuan District]], Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the [[:en:Southern Cross-Island Highway|Southern Cross-Island Highway]] ([[:en:Southern Cross-Island Highway|Taiwan Route 20]] 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.

Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

== See also ==

* [[:en:Yushan National Park|Yushan National Park]]
* [[:en:Eternal Spring Shrine|Eternal Spring Shrine]]

{{Coord|24.164536|121.604555|display=title}}
[[File:Changching_Shrine.jpg|thumb|A closer view of the Evergreen Shrine]]

The '''Evergreen Ancestral Hall''' is a memorial in Taiwan. It is located in {{ill|Kaohsiung|en|Kaohsiung|WD=Q181557|lt=Kaohsiung City}}, {{ill|Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|en|Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|WD=Q708252|lt=Taoyuan District}}, Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the {{ill|Southern Cross-Island Highway|en|Southern Cross-Island Highway|WD=Q7569814|lt=Southern Cross-Island Highway}} ({{ill|Southern Cross-Island Highway|en|Southern Cross-Island Highway|WD=Q7569814|lt=Taiwan Route 20}} 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.

Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

== See also ==

* {{ill|Yushan National Park|en|Yushan National Park|WD=Q3446446|lt=Yushan National Park}}
* {{ill|Eternal Spring Shrine|en|Eternal Spring Shrine|WD=Q4501089|lt=Eternal Spring Shrine}}

}}

}}

{{Coord|24.164536|121.604555|display=title}}
[[File:Changching_Shrine.jpg|thumb|A closer view of the Evergreen Shrine]]

The '''Evergreen Ancestral Hall''' is a memorial in Taiwan. It is located in {{ill|Kaohsiung|en|Kaohsiung|WD=Q181557|lt=Kaohsiung City|1=Kaohsiung}}, {{ill|Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|en|Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|WD=Q708252|lt=Taoyuan District|1=Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung}}, Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the {{ill|Southern Cross-Island Highway|en|Southern Cross-Island Highway|WD=Q7569814|lt=Southern Cross-Island Highway|1=Southern Cross-Island Highway}} ({{ill|Southern Cross-Island Highway|en|Southern Cross-Island Highway|WD=Q7569814|lt=Taiwan Route 20|1=Southern Cross-Island Highway}} 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.

Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

* {{ill|Yushan National Park|en|Yushan National Park|WD=Q3446446|lt=Yushan National Park|1=Yushan National Park}}

{{Coord|24.164536|121.604555|display=title}}
[[File:Changching_Shrine.jpg|thumb|A closer view of the Evergreen Shrine]]

The '''Evergreen Ancestral Hall''' is a memorial in Taiwan. It is located in {{ill|Kaohsiung|en|Kaohsiung|WD=Q181557|lt=Kaohsiung City|1=Kaohsiung}}, {{ill|Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|en|Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|WD=Q708252|lt=Taoyuan District|1=Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung}}, Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the {{ill|Southern Cross-Island Highway|en|Southern Cross-Island Highway|WD=Q7569814|lt=Southern Cross-Island Highway|1=Southern Cross-Island Highway}} ({{ill|Southern Cross-Island Highway|en|Southern Cross-Island Highway|WD=Q7569814|lt=Taiwan Route 20|1=Southern Cross-Island Highway}} 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.

Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

== See also ==

* {{ill|Yushan National Park|en|Yushan National Park|WD=Q3446446|lt=Yushan National Park|1=Yushan National Park}}
* {{ill|Eternal Spring Shrine|en|Eternal Spring Shrine|WD=Q4501089|lt=Eternal Spring Shrine|1=Eternal Spring Shrine}}

{{AfC submission|t||ts=20220726100643|u=Immanuelle|ns=118|demo=}}
{{unreferenced|date=July 2022}}

{{Coord|24.164536|121.604555|display=title}}
[[File:Changching_Shrine.jpg|thumb|A closer view of the Evergreen Shrine]]

The '''Evergreen Ancestral Hall''' is a memorial in Taiwan. It is located in {{ill|Kaohsiung|en|Kaohsiung|WD=Q181557|lt=Kaohsiung City|1=Kaohsiung}}, {{ill|Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|en|Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung|WD=Q708252|lt=Taoyuan District|1=Taoyuan District, Kaohsiung}}, Tianchi, at the intersection of the east and west sections of the {{ill|Southern Cross-Island Highway|en|Southern Cross-Island Highway|WD=Q7569814|lt=Southern Cross-Island Highway|1=Southern Cross-Island Highway}} ({{ill|Southern Cross-Island Highway|en|Southern Cross-Island Highway|WD=Q7569814|lt=Taiwan Route 20|1=Southern Cross-Island Highway}} 135.5 km). The memorial is dedicated to the 116 engineers and workers who died in the course of the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway. Since the construction of the Southern Cross-Island Highway was difficult and there were casualties, the then Taiwan Provincial Highway Bureau decided to build a shrine at Tianchi in 1979 in order to pay tribute to the souls of the heroes.

Behind the shrine, there is a stone staircase that leads to the Heavenly Pond.

== See also ==

* {{ill|Yushan National Park|en|Yushan National Park|WD=Q3446446|lt=Yushan National Park|1=Yushan National Park}}
* {{ill|Eternal Spring Shrine|en|Eternal Spring Shrine|WD=Q4501089|lt=Eternal Spring Shrine|1=Eternal Spring Shrine}}

}}

<!--this page is not from a simple english ]]
}}
{{Drafts moved from mainspace|date=July 2022}}
